case_title: BLANCO, JUAN vs. ESPINOZA, JOSEPH IND & DBA PROFFESSIONAL PAINTING

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLANCO, JUAN AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, JOSEPH IND & DBA PROFFESSIONAL PAINTING & DECORATORS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLANCO, JUAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, JOSEPH IND & DBA PROFFESSIONAL PAINTING & DECORATORS $6,251.15 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,331.15

parties.name: ESPINOZA, JOSEPH IND & DBA PROFFESSIONAL PAINTING, & DECORATORS
